---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-17"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```


```{r}


library(tidyverse)
library(here)

# Load poll country averages
country_avg_poll <- read.csv(here("output", "country_avg_poll.csv"))

# Load constituency data
aux <- read.csv("https://mrp-psf.ams3.digitaloceanspaces.com/other-files/const_data_full_new.csv")
aux <- aux %>% mutate(const_name = gsub("Ynys Mon", "Ynys Môn", const_name))

# Create country variable in aux
aux <- aux %>%
  mutate(
    region_2 = case_when(
      region_name %in% c(
        "East Midlands", "East of England", "Greater London",
        "North East England", "North West England", "South East England",
        "South West England", "West Midlands", "Yorkshire and the Humber",
        "London", "England"
      ) ~ "England",
      region_name == "Scotland" ~ "Scotland",
      region_name == "Wales"    ~ "Wales",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

# Load constituency-level MRP predictions


preds_bbc <- read.csv(here("output", "bbc_bias_constituency_summary_revised.csv"))


# Join region onto predictions
preds_bbc <- preds_bbc %>%
  left_join(aux %>% select(const_name, region_2), by = "const_name") %>%
  mutate(
    region_2 = case_when(
      const_name == "Ynys MÃ´n" ~ "Wales",
      TRUE                     ~ region_2
    )
  )



preds_bbc <- preds_bbc %>%
  left_join(
    country_avg_poll %>% select(country, net_score_poll_cntry_avg),
    by = c("region_2" = "country")
  )

## compute MRP average per country

preds_bbc <- preds_bbc %>%
  mutate(net_score = very_left + mod_left - mod_right - very_right) %>%
  group_by(region_2) %>%
  mutate(mrp_average = mean(net_score)) %>%
  ungroup()



## compute multiplier and reweighted net score (key step)
preds_bbc_reweighted <- preds_bbc %>%
  mutate(
    mult = net_score_poll_cntry_avg / mrp_average,   # region-level multiplier
    net_score_reweighted = net_score * mult    # rescale each constituency
  )


## compute additive adjustment and reweighted net score
preds_bbc_additive <- preds_bbc %>%
  mutate(
    adjustment = net_score_poll_cntry_avg - mrp_average,   # gap between poll and MRP country average
    net_score_reweighted = net_score + adjustment    # shift each constituency by that gap
  )



write.csv(preds_bbc_additive, here("output", "preds_bbc_additive_revised_full.csv"), row.names = FALSE)



preds_bbc_reweighted <- preds_bbc %>% select(const_name, net_score_reweighted)


preds_bbc_additive <- preds_bbc_additive %>% select(const_name, net_score_reweighted)



neg_seats <- preds_bbc_reweighted %>%
  filter(net_score_reweighted < 0) %>%
  select(const_name, net_score_reweighted)

 neg_seats


 
 
 neg_seats_additive <- preds_bbc_additive %>%
  filter(net_score_reweighted < 0) %>%
  select(const_name, net_score_reweighted)

 neg_seats
 

write.csv(preds_bbc_reweighted, here("output", "preds_bbc_reweighted_revised.csv"), row.names = FALSE)




write.csv(preds_bbc_additive, here("output", "preds_bbc_additive_revised.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
